evaluations.query: Generate tests for the authentication service
expected_behavior: Asks user to select test tiers (unit, integration, e2e) and healing strategy
Runs 6-phase workflow: discovery, coverage analysis, generation, execution, heal, report
Spawns parallel test-generator agents per selected tier
Produces a coverage report with before/after delta comparison

evaluations.query: Cover the payment module with --tier=unit,integration tests
expected_behavior: Parses --tier flag and limits generation to unit and integration only
Skips the tier selection prompt since --tier flag is explicit
Launches 2 parallel agents (unit + integration), not 3
Reports coverage for unit and integration tiers only
Scans for docker-compose.yml or testcontainers in dependencies
Uses real database and services for integration tests when infrastructure found
Errors with clear message if --real-services flag used but no docker/testcontainers found
Reports which real services were used in the final coverage report

evaluations.query: Generate tests for the user service, auto-heal failures
expected_behavior: Runs generated tests and identifies failures
Heals failing tests up to 3 iterations maximum
Fixes only test code, never modifies production source code
Reports remaining failures if not resolved within 3 iterations

evaluations.query: Verify my existing tests are good quality
expected_behavior: Should NOT generate new tests for a verify/grade request
Should redirect to the verify skill for grading existing tests
Does not run the 6-phase cover workflow for verification tasks

evaluations.query: Run the full test suite with coverage and show me progress as it goes
expected_behavior: Runs npm test (or equivalent) with run_in_background=true
Uses Monitor(pid=...) to stream each line as a notification
Does NOT wait synchronously and dump the full output at the end
Does NOT poll TaskOutput in a loop
